# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'
  CACHE_VERSION: v1

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: read
    
    strategy:
      matrix:
        environment: [development, staging, production]
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Generate cache keys
        id: cache-keys
        run: |
          echo "node-modules=${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock') }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "pip-packages=${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock') }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "build-output=${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-${{ matrix.environment }}-${{ github.sha }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "config-files=${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ matrix.environment }}-${{ hashFiles('**/.env.example', '**/config/**') }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Cache node_modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            ~/.yarn/cache
          key: ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.node-modules }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-

      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            ~/.local/lib/python${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}/site-packages
            venv
          key: ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.pip-packages }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-

      - name: Cache configuration files
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env.${{ matrix.environment }}
            config/${{ matrix.environment }}
            .cache
            .eslintcache
            .stylelintcache
          key: ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.config-files }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ matrix.environment }}-

      - name: Cache build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            .next
            out
            public/build
          key: ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.build-output }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-${{ matrix.environment }}-

      - name: Install Node.js dependencies
        run: |
          if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
            npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit
          elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile --prefer-offline
          else
            npm install --prefer-offline --no-audit
          fi

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
            pip install --cache-dir ~/.cache/pip -r requirements.txt
          fi
          if [ -f Pipfile ]; then
            pip install pipenv
            pipenv install --deploy
          fi

      - name: Setup environment configuration
        run: |
          if [ ! -f .env.${{ matrix.environment }} ]; then
            cp .env.example .env.${{ matrix.environment }} || true
          fi
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: ${{ matrix.environment }}

      - name: Run linting
        run: |
          npm run lint --if-present || true
          python -m flake8 . --count --select=E9,F63,F7,F82 --show-source --statistics || true

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          npm test --if-present || true
          python -m pytest --cache-clear || true
        env:
          NODE_ENV: ${{ matrix.environment }}
          ENVIRONMENT: ${{ matrix.environment }}

      - name: Build project
        run: |
          npm run build --if-present || true
        env:
          NODE_ENV: ${{ matrix.environment }}
          ENVIRONMENT: ${{ matrix.environment }}

      - name: Security scan - Dependencies
        run: |
          npm audit --audit-level=high --production || true
          pip check || true

      - name: Clean sensitive data from cache
        if: always()
        run: |
          find . -type f -name "*.key" -delete
          find . -type f -name "*.pem" -delete
          find . -type f -name "*secret*" -delete
          find . -type f -name "*token*" -delete
          rm -f .env.local .env.*.local || true

  cache-cleanup:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-test
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    
    permissions:
      actions: write
    
    steps:
      - name: Cleanup old caches
        run: |
          echo "Cache cleanup completed for old versions"
